purpose: Controlled HNN/forced-damped-HNN benchmark on the full-index v4 release. The primary path freezes one shared stage-1 SFT and MSE AE, pretrains dynamics to an explicit validation stability gate, then performs low-LR stage-2 SFT with KL, dynamics-to-LoRA warm-up, gradient-conflict diagnostics, and direct inference.

dataset_profile.name: structured_pathway_continuation_v4_full
dataset_profile.source: A resumable canonical index scans every processed_graph JSON exactly once. Nodes, relations, reactions, action subtypes, graph layers, aliases, producer provenance, legacy Step12 text, corrected deterministic text, and stable graph/view/record/sample identities are preserved; processed text is used only for counterpart coverage reconciliation.
dataset_profile.relation_truth: Directed core topology uses only supported directional processed_graph relation subtypes and reaction substrate/product direction. Association, dissociation, state-change, compound-mediator, hidden-compound, and unsupported subtype facts remain context and never create an invented time edge.
dataset_profile.selection: The full canonical index is never sampled or family-capped. After complete-JSON 8192-token filtering, training candidates are processed in a deterministic coverage-first order: one record per seen source, all human records, one record per graph, then stable-rank fill. A record is accepted only while its conservative full-horizon cost fits the 515,000,000-token one-epoch envelope. One globally balanced short/middle/long prefix is then assigned per accepted record.
dataset_profile.training_size_budget: One formal SFT epoch targets at most 515,000,000 complete input tokens, approximately 72 hours under the conservative measured four-A100 reference including validation. The release recommends one epoch and permits at most five explicitly exploratory epochs; observed v4 packed throughput must replace the estimate after the first run.
dataset_profile.primary_training_condition: P0 supplies the known KEGG organism code and retains source-native identifiers; all SFT, AE, HNN, and forced/damped HNN training in this matrix uses only P0 train and validation

prompt_controls.no_explicit_organism_source_native_ids: P1 removes only the explicit organism name; source-native identifiers may still reveal species, so this is not a species-free condition.
prompt_controls.species_neutral_ids_no_organism: P2 is restricted to naturally species-neutral identifiers or a separately audited mapping; prefix stripping is forbidden and incomplete eligibility must be reported explicitly.

diagnostic_tests.test: data/pathway_v4_full/test_pathway_continuation_v4.csv (seen organisms and the primary 10% held-out pathway families)
diagnostic_tests.test_organism: data/pathway_v4_full/test_organism_pathway_continuation_v4.csv (dataset-coverage-stratified held-out source codes and training families)
diagnostic_tests.test_strict: data/pathway_v4_full/test_strict_pathway_continuation_v4.csv (dataset-coverage-stratified held-out source codes and any non-train families)

dataset_profile.release_gate: The scheduler requires all five P0 CSV/record JSONL pairs, schema v4.0, exact file and source hashes, a complete full-corpus canonical index, zero strict identity/family leakage in the declared comparisons, globally optimal horizon balance, zero accepted rows above 8192 tokens, and read-only mode 0444 data_audit.json.
dataset_profile.semantic_unit: Each dynamics substep encodes the complete canonical relation/reaction object, not only its text. Canonical within-layer traversal uses a short surrogate increment and every graph-layer boundary uses a larger increment. Layer depth is preserved, while within-layer order is not claimed to be measured biological time.
dataset_profile.epoch_prefix_sampling: The formal v4 CSV contains one globally balanced, seed-fixed short/middle/long prefix per unique selected record. The full canonical index retains every eligible prefix choice so later registered rematerializations can test alternative horizon schedules without reparsing graphs.
dataset_profile.source_schema_note: v4 reconstructs sink-SCC views from strict processed_graph topology, merges only semantic duplicates after layer assignment while retaining every producer event ID, treats additional IDs on a non-group KGML entry as aliases, and excludes phenotype from the core target.

sequence_budget.streaming_progress_artifact: direct.progress.jsonl (one gold/prediction audit record per completed sample)
sequence_budget.inference_batch_policy: Pinned because batch_size can change greedy floating-point trajectories; four-GPU speedup uses disjoint data shards instead.
sequence_budget.target_policy: Every assistant answer is one complete closed pathway_continuation_v4 JSON object with rich action fields. Rows over 8192 total tokens are excluded before materialization and counted in data_audit.json; JSON is never truncated.

validation_policy.selection: explicit deterministic family-disjoint P0 validation CSV on seen organisms, reused by SFT, AE, and every stage-2 arm
validation_policy.reason: checkpoint selection measures unseen-family generalization without conflating it with the separate held-out-organism effect

artifact_scope: checkpoints/seeds/<seed>/... and runs/seeds/<seed>/...; within a seed all stage-2 arms reuse that seed's shared SFT and AE

a_dynamics.a1_hnn_orthogonal_poisson: Pure HNN with J=Q^T J0 Q, exactly skew, full-rank, and J^2=-I.
a_dynamics.a2_forced_damped_hnn: (J-rI) grad H + F(t), with isotropic positive damping and time-only force.

b_ae.b1_reconstruction_mse_shared: One shared frozen reconstruction AE trained with MSE on answer tokens plus the final prompt anchor; cosine is disabled in the main baseline and retained only as an explicit ablation.
b_ae.b2_predictive_ae: Optional reconstruction plus one-layer prediction objective.
b_ae.b3_geometry_ae: Optional reconstruction plus latent mean, variance, and off-diagonal covariance conditioning without assigning arbitrary q/p coordinates.

d_training_schedule.shared_prerequisite: Train stage-1 SFT and AE once.
d_training_schedule.d1_stage2_sft_control: Same stage-2 loop with every dynamics loss and dynamics LR set to zero.
d_training_schedule.d2_dynamics_only: Freeze stage-1 LoRA and AE; train only HNN/FDHNN for one to three epochs with a validation stability gate.
d_training_schedule.d3_pretrain_then_joint: Warm-start from stable D2, then low-LR stage-2 SFT with KL and a 10% dynamics-to-LoRA gradient warm-up.
d_training_schedule.d4_direct_joint: Start stage-2 SFT and dynamics jointly from a randomly initialized vector field; retained as the direct-joint ablation.

c_inference.c0_trajectory_stability: No generation; evaluate only the D2 dynamics trajectory and stability gate.
c_inference.c1_direct_lora: Direct greedy LoRA generation. Dynamics is not loaded at generation time.

implemented.title: Shared stage-1 SFT and reconstruction AE prerequisites
implemented.granularity: token CE; AE answer states plus prompt anchor
implemented.training_coupling: four-GPU DDP SFT followed by one shared frozen-AE training run
implemented.notes: Run once per dataset revision and seed; every controlled stage-2 row reuses checkpoint_best from both stages.

implemented.title: Stage-1 shared SFT direct baseline
implemented.notes: Measures the stage-1 baseline; not the compute-matched dynamics control.

implemented.title: Compute-matched stage-2 SFT-only control
implemented.granularity: token CE; semantic-layer computations retained with zero auxiliary weights
implemented.middle_network: Hamiltonian branch computed but all dynamics weights and LR are zero
implemented.training_coupling: shared SFT/AE then the exact stage-2 schedule without an effective dynamics objective
implemented.notes: Primary attribution control for staged and direct-joint arms; it uses the same low LoRA LR, stage-1 KL, rows, epochs, and validation split but zero dynamics objective.
implemented.what_it_tests: Separates extra stage-2 SFT compute from dynamics regularization.

implemented.title: Pure HNN dynamics-only pretraining
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = J grad H; J=Q^T J0 Q
implemented.training_coupling: freeze stage-1 SFT and MSE AE; optimize only HNN for one to three epochs
implemented.notes: D2 control and required initialization for E011; no LoRA parameter is updated.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether conservative HNN dynamics can fit the fixed SFT+AE event trajectory.

implemented.title: Pure HNN pretraining then regularized stage-2 SFT
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = J grad H; J=Q^T J0 Q
implemented.training_coupling: stable E010 HNN then low-LR LoRA+dynamics with KL and 10% dynamics-to-LoRA warm-up
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation from best validation composite
implemented.notes: Primary conservative staged control; saves best SFT, dynamics, composite, and last checkpoints.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether stabilizing HNN before LoRA updates improves over D2, D4, and SFT-only.

implemented.title: Forced/damped HNN dynamics-only pretraining
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = (J-rI) grad H + F(t); J=Q^T J0 Q, r>=0
implemented.training_coupling: freeze stage-1 SFT and MSE AE; optimize only forced/damped HNN for one to three epochs
implemented.notes: D2 primary dynamics fit and required initialization for E021.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether dissipation and time forcing fit fixed event trajectories better than pure HNN.

implemented.title: Forced/damped HNN pretraining then regularized stage-2 SFT
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = (J-rI) grad H + F(t); J=Q^T J0 Q, r>=0
implemented.training_coupling: stable E020 FDHNN then low-LR LoRA+dynamics with KL and 10% dynamics-to-LoRA warm-up
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation from best validation composite
implemented.notes: Primary method. Upstream pathway changes z0; no independent intervention input u is claimed.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether staged forced/damped HNN improves over staged pure HNN, direct joint, and SFT-only.

implemented.title: Pure HNN direct-joint stage-2 ablation
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = J grad H; J=Q^T J0 Q
implemented.training_coupling: randomly initialized HNN and LoRA are optimized jointly from the first batch
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation; HNN is a training regularizer
implemented.notes: E012/D4 ablation; same low LoRA LR and KL as D3, but no dynamics pretraining or warm-up.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether HNN pretraining and gradient warm-up matter beyond direct joint optimization.

implemented.title: Forced/damped HNN direct-joint stage-2 ablation
implemented.granularity: complete event-object substeps with explicit graph-layer boundary increments
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = (J-rI) grad H + F(t); J=Q^T J0 Q, r>=0
implemented.training_coupling: randomly initialized FDHNN and LoRA are optimized jointly from the first batch
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation; dynamics is a training regularizer
implemented.notes: E022/D4 ablation; same low LoRA LR and KL as D3, but no dynamics pretraining or warm-up.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether FDHNN pretraining and gradient warm-up matter beyond direct joint optimization.

combinations.title: Graph-layer-by-graph-layer generation with a validated JSON layer-boundary controller
combinations.training_requirement: Reuse the graph-layer dynamics checkpoint only when one dynamics advance corresponds to one completed graph layer.
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Compare against direct greedy generation on biological validity, JSON validity, long-horizon error, and compute.

combinations.title: Token-by-token generation with separately trained token-resolution dynamics
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Compare against direct greedy and graph-layer generation on biological validity, JSON validity, long-horizon error, and compute.

combinations.title: Multiscale hybrid generation combining token and completed-layer controllers
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Ablate each controller and compare against direct greedy generation under matched decoding budgets.

combinations.title: PHNN only after an independently observed port/control variable is defined
Neural ODE with the same shared SFT/AE and semantic-layer targets
Complete-candidate LLM plus held-out-calibrated HNN diagnostic reranking
